title: closia cotula var. elata
intro: Closia cotula var. elata, also known as the 'Tropical Sweet Clove', is a variety of the Closia cotula plant, a tropical plant native to the Pacific Islands, characterized by its fragrant flowers and leaves. The medicinal properties of Closia cotula var. elata include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. Closia cotula var. elata can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water, or it can be used in aromatherapy to release its fragrance and potential health benefits.
